OverHistory.CommentStrikers: Mohammad Shami TO K L Rahul
OverHistory.NewCommentry: Mohammad Shami to K L Rahul Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Mohammad Shami bowling to K L Rahul, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, K L Rahul plays an aggressive lofted cover drive on the front foot WICKET K L Rahul c Mohsin Khan b Mohammad Shami (Delhi Capitals 0 Runs for 1 wickets) towards Deep Backward Point
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Shami gets the big big wicket! They need few more like this! Its game on at Lucknow!, Mohammad Shami bowling to K L Rahul, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, K L Rahul, on his first ball tries to go over cover with the loft, he gets that in the outside part of the bat ends up slicing it to point, Mohsin Khan, without even moving a bit from the position, completes the catch! Shami Get Rahul on his debut for LSG! 

WICKET K L Rahul c Mohsin Khan b Mohammad Shami (Delhi Capitals 0 Runs for 1 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Mohsin Khan to Nitish Rana Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Mohsin Khan bowling to Nitish Rana, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Nitish Rana glides it WICKET Nitish Rana c Abdul Samad b Mohsin Khan (Delhi Capitals 21 Runs for 2 wickets) towards 1st Slip
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Edged and Taken!, Mohsin Khan bowling to Nitish Rana, short of good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Nitish Rana tries to guide this, but the extra bounce catches the edge of his willow, Samad at first slip completes the catch on his second attempt! Rana Departs after a brief stay as DC are two down! 

WICKET Nitish Rana c Abdul Samad b Mohsin Khan (Delhi Capitals 21 Runs for 2 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Prince Yadav to Pathum Nissanka Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Prince Yadav bowling to Pathum Nissanka, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Pathum Nissanka plays an aggressive front foot flick WICKET Pathum Nissanka c Rishabh Pant b Prince Yadav (Delhi Capitals 25 Runs for 3 wickets) towards Backward Short Leg
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
DC are three down! All of a suuden this 142-run target looks like a 240!, Prince Yadav bowling a good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Pathum Nissanka tries to flick it on the on-side, he was way too early in the attempt, ends up getting the top-edge as the ball goes high in the night sky. Pant calls it mine and takes the catch! DC are three down! Not a debut to remember for Nissanka! 

WICKET Pathum Nissanka c Rishabh Pant b Prince Yadav (Delhi Capitals 25 Runs for 3 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Prince Yadav to Axar Patel 1 (WD)
OverHistory.Commentry: Prince Yadav bowling to Axar Patel, short length ball, pitching outside leg stump, Axar Patel offers no shot, 1 wide(s) gets added to the extras
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Prince Yadav bowling to Axar Patel, short length ball, pitching outside leg stump, Axar Patel offers no shot, 1 wide(s) gets added to the extras

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Prince Yadav to Axar Patel Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Prince Yadav bowling to Axar Patel, good length ball, pitching on middle stump, Axar Patel plays a defensive forward push WICKET Axar Patel b Prince Yadav (Delhi Capitals 26 Runs for 4 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Four Down Now! DC slide further!, Prince Yadav bowling a good length ball, rushing Axar, who looked to work this towards the on-side but fails to get a bit forward, the ball beats his bat, hits the pad first and knocks the stumps! Prince is elated, so is LSG! The game is truly on now with DC already losing four inside five overs! The best part is that both of their key batters depart for a duck! 

WICKET Axar Patel b Prince Yadav (Delhi Capitals 26 Runs for 4 wickets)
